content:
Jupiter in Cancer: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Jupiter in Cancer blends the archetypal drive of Jupiter (where you grow, seek meaning, and find opportunity) with the Water, cardinal nature of Cancer.

  • Planet: Jupiter — growth, expansion, belief, opportunity, wisdom
  • Sign: Cancer (Water/Cardinal) — emotion, nurturing, home, protection, memory

Eastern Perspective
